mapper.select: select dispute_id, order_id, buyer_user_id, seller_user_id, status, reason, buyer_note, seller_note, resolution_type, resolved_by, resolved_at, create_time, update_time from virtual_dispute where dispute_id = #{disputeId}

select dispute_id, order_id, buyer_user_id, seller_user_id, status, reason, buyer_note, seller_note, resolution_type, resolved_by, resolved_at, create_time, update_time from virtual_dispute where order_id = #{orderId} order by dispute_id desc
